outputs.patch.diff:
--- a/ae_overview_table.R
+++ b/ae_overview_table.R
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@
 # Filter for safety population
 adae_safety <- adae %>%
   # BUG 1: Wrong population filter - should use SAFFL instead of ITTFL
-  filter(ITTFL == "Y") %>%
+  filter(SAFFL == "Y") %>%
   # Add treatment group labels
   mutate(
     TRTA = if_else(TRTAN == 0, "Placebo", 
@@ -25,7 +25,8 @@
 # Calculate TEAE counts by treatment group
 teae_counts <- adae_safety %>%
   # BUG 2: TEAE count missing TRTEMFL filter - should include TRTEMFL == "Y"
-  filter() %>%
+  filter(TRTEMFL == "Y") %>%
   group_by(TRTA) %>%
   # BUG 3: Event count not distinct - should count distinct subjects
-  summarise(n_subjects = n())
+  summarise(n_subjects = n_distinct(USUBJID))
